scripts.kill-ports: powershell -NoProfile -Command "@(4000,4001,4002,4003,4004) | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($c) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -EA SilentlyContinue } }"
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=course-service" "npm run dev --workspace=payment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=ai-service" "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway"
scripts.start: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm start --workspace=user-service" "npm start --workspace=course-service" "npm start --workspace=payment-service" "npm start --workspace=ai-service" "npm start --workspace=api-gateway"
